impact: The PP&D daemon now checks only changed Python and TypeScript files for parser/type syntax failures immediately after applying a proposal. Parser failures roll back with failure kind syntax_preflight and compact diagnostics before broader validation runs.
summary: Add daemon syntax preflight before full validation
target_task: Task checkbox-54: Task checkbox-49: Add a daemon syntax-preflight step that checks only changed Python and TypeScript files before full validation. Python files must use `py_compile`; TypeScript files must use the existing strict `tsc --noEmit` command scoped to changed `.ts`/`.tsx` files. On parser failure, rollback immediately with failure kind `syntax_preflight` and compact diagnostics.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
